scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc -p worker/tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json
scripts.deploy:web: pnpm build:prod && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name shipkitty --branch github-oauth-flow
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply petship-db --local --config worker/wrangler.toml
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply petship-db --remote --config worker/wrangler.toml
